description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with a flat roof and a prominent use of red brick on its exterior walls. Large rectangular windows dominate the front facade, allowing ample natural light into the interior spaces. The structure includes a spacious rooftop terrace with green flooring, likely intended as a garden or recreational area. The front entryway is marked by a double door with glass panels, flanked by multiple windows, and a garage door is visible on one side. The rear and side elevations have fewer windows and a more utilitarian appearance, with some asymmetrical window placements. The overall aesthetic is minimalist, with clean lines and a focus on functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed brick house with large windows, a rooftop terrace, and a prominent front entryway with a garage.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance with double glass doors, large windows, and a garage door on the right side.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the long rooftop terrace and a side balcony, with fewer windows visible.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a mostly solid brick wall with asymmetrically placed windows and a small vertical window near the center.
description_view_3: The right side view reveals a single window and a secondary door, as well as the continuation of the rooftop terrace.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Double glass doors with sidelights, no porch, and a simple, clean-lined entry flanked by windows.
